full_text:
Zong Hong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zong Hongwas born in Liaodong. Cao Cao’s envoy to Gongsun Kang and Cao Pi’s envoy to Gongsun Gong. Zong Hong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
